Interim Clinical Considerations for Use of COVID-19 Vaccines in the United States 
Nov. 4, 2025 
EspaÃ±ol 
At a glance 
These clinical considerations provide guidance to healthcare professionals and public health officials on use of COVID-19 vaccines. 
The Table of Contents on each page can be used to navigate to all guidance pages. 
A PDF version of the complete clinical considerations is available below to download and print. 
Summary of recent changes 
Last updated November 4, 20
